job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst
Company: SGS Consulting
Source: LinkedIn via Jobs via Dice
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/healthcare-data-analyst-at-jobs-via-dice-4368266863

- Remote healthcare data analyst role in population health management.
- Reporting, dashboards, analytics validation, and delivery documentation.
strengths: Population health and dashboard support are adjacent

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Population Health Reporting | Data Validation
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted healthcare data for reporting and analytics. Strong expertise in advanced SQL, source-to-target testing, quality-focused validation, and cross-functional support for dashboards, reporting outputs, and delivery documentation.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), dashboard QA and reporting support
replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)

replacements.replace: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in dashboards and downstream KPIs.
replacements.find: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in payer-operations dashboards and downstream KPIs.

gaps: HEDIS/quality measure depth is not explicit
notes: Tailored toward reporting, dashboards, validation, and healthcare quality analytics support.
validation_notes: posting date could not be verified
